title: Label non-compliant: missing state of distillation (crop-occlusion, level 7, tilt-left)
image_prompt: Photorealistic thick glass bottle with a dark, industrial label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Oak & Iron', 'Straight Bourbon Whiskey', '45% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Bottled by Oak & Iron Distillers, Brooklyn, NY'. (Note: strictly no state of distillation included). Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: FAIL compliance (Missing state of distillation for straight whiskey)
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate cropping or partial occlusion. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
